AUTOMATON-ALLOCATE.description:
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each Status in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and [gold]Bronze Orb[/gold].{InCombat:cond:
(Gain {Status:diff()}{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)})|}
AUTOMATON-ALLOCATE.title: Allocate
AUTOMATON-ASSEMBLY.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
[gold]Encode[/gold] any drawn cards with [gold]Encode[/gold].
AUTOMATON-ASSEMBLY.title: Assembly
AUTOMATON-BACKTRACE.title: Backtrace
AUTOMATON-BIT_SHIFT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw a card from your [gold]Bronze Orb[/gold].
AUTOMATON-BIT_SHIFT.title: Bit Shift
AUTOMATON-BLOCKCHAIN.title: Blockchain
AUTOMATON-BOOST.title: Boost
AUTOMATON-BRANCH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage or gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
The option not chosen is [gold]Encoded[/gold].
AUTOMATON-BRANCH.title: Branch
AUTOMATON-BRANCH_ATTACK.title: Branch: Attack
AUTOMATON-BRANCH_BLOCK.title: Branch: Block
AUTOMATON-BREAK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add an [gold]Error[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold], [gold]Draw Pile[/gold],[gold] Discard Pile[/gold] and [gold]Stash[/gold].
AUTOMATON-BREAK.title: Crash
AUTOMATON-BRONZE_ARMOR.title: Bronze Armor
AUTOMATON-BRONZE_ORB.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Stash[/gold] the next card you play this turn.
AUTOMATON-BRONZE_ORB.title: Bronze Orb
AUTOMATON-BUGGY_MESS.title: Buggy Mess
AUTOMATON-BUG_BARRAGE.description:
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Errors[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Discard each Status in your [gold]Hand[/gold], then draw that many cards, dealing {Damage:diff()} damage for each.
AUTOMATON-BUG_BARRAGE.title: Bug Barrage
AUTOMATON-BURN_OUT.description: Whenever you [gold]Stash[/gold] a Status or Curse, deal {BurnOutPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it instead.
AUTOMATON-BURN_OUT.title: Burn Out
AUTOMATON-CLASS_DEFAULT.description: Increase the damage and [gold]Block[/gold] of ALL Functions by {ClassDefaultPower:diff()}.
AUTOMATON-CLASS_DEFAULT.title: Class Default
AUTOMATON-CLEAN_CODE.description: At the end of your turn, you may [gold]Stash[/gold] {CleanCodePower:plural:a card|{} cards}.
AUTOMATON-CLEAN_CODE.title: Clean Code
AUTOMATON-CONSTRUCTOR.description: When [gold]Encoded[/gold] as the first card, increase its [gold]Block[/gold] by {ExtraBlock:diff()}.
AUTOMATON-CONSTRUCTOR.title: Constructor
AUTOMATON-COPY_PASTE.description: The next card you play this turn that costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} or less is played an extra time.
AUTOMATON-COPY_PASTE.title: Copy Paste
AUTOMATON-CULTIST_STRIKE.description: Permanently increase this card's damage by {Increase:diff()}.
AUTOMATON-CULTIST_STRIKE.title: Cultist Strike
AUTOMATON-CUT_THROUGH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Scry[/gold] {Scry:diff()}.
[gold]Stash[/gold] the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AUTOMATON-CUT_THROUGH.title: Cut Through
AUTOMATON-DEFEND_AUTOMATON.title: Defend
AUTOMATON-DEPRECATE.title: Deprecate
AUTOMATON-DEV_TOOLS.title: Dev Tools
AUTOMATON-DIGITAL_CARNAGE.title: Digital Carnage
AUTOMATON-FIND_AND_REPLACE.description:
Put a card from your [gold]Bronze Orb[/gold], [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], or [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Put an [gold]Error[/gold] where it was.
AUTOMATON-FIND_AND_REPLACE.title: Find and Replace
AUTOMATON-FINE_TUNING.description:
Choose {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your Hand.
[gold]Stash[/gold] it, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it, and give it [gold]Retain[/gold].
AUTOMATON-FINE_TUNING.title: Fine Tuning
AUTOMATON-FLAIL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies twice.
Remove your [gold]Weak[/gold], [gold]Frail[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
End your turn.
AUTOMATON-FLAIL.title: Flail
AUTOMATON-FORCE_SHIELD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less for each card you've created this combat.
AUTOMATON-FORCE_SHIELD.title: Force Shield
AUTOMATON-FORMAT.title: Format
AUTOMATON-FORTIFY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Stash[/gold] {Stash:diff()} cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AUTOMATON-FORTIFY.title: Fortify
AUTOMATON-FOR_LOOP.description: The next time you [gold]Encode[/gold] a card, [gold]Encode[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} additional copies.
AUTOMATON-FOR_LOOP.title: For Loop
AUTOMATON-FRAGMENT.title: Fragment
AUTOMATON-FRONTLOAD.description: The next time you create a Function, it has [gold]Retain[/gold].
AUTOMATON-FRONTLOAD.title: Frontload
AUTOMATON-FULL_RELEASE.title: Full Release
AUTOMATON-FUNCTION_CARD.title: function()
AUTOMATON-FUNCTION_SKILL_CARD.title: function()
AUTOMATON-FUNCTION_POWER_CARD.title: function()
AUTOMATON-FUNCTION_ATTACK_CARD.title: function()
AUTOMATON-GOTO.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
When a Status card is created, reduce this card's cost to {Energy:energyIcons()} until played.
AUTOMATON-GOTO.title: Goto
AUTOMATON-HYPER_BEAM_AUTOMATON.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies. 
[gold]Stash[/gold] {Cards:diff()} [gold]Voids[/gold].
AUTOMATON-HYPER_BEAM_AUTOMATON.title: HYPER BEAM
AUTOMATON-INFINITE_BEAMS.description: At the start of your turn, add a [gold]Minor Beam[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AUTOMATON-INFINITE_BEAMS.title: Infinite Beams
AUTOMATON-INFINITE_LOOP.description: The next time you create a Function, gain a copy of this with {InfiniteLoopPower:diff()} additional damage.
AUTOMATON-INFINITE_LOOP.title: Infinite Loop
AUTOMATON-INVALIDATE.title: Invalidate
AUTOMATON-ITERATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Increase the number of hits on this card by {Increase:diff()}.
AUTOMATON-ITERATE.title: Iterate
AUTOMATON-ITS_A_FEATURE.description: Whenever you create a card, gain {ItsAFeaturePower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
AUTOMATON-ITS_A_FEATURE.title: It's a Feature
AUTOMATON-LIBRARY.description:
At the start of your turn, add a random card with [gold]Encode[/gold] to your Hand.
It's free to play this turn.
AUTOMATON-LIBRARY.title: Library
AUTOMATON-MAX_OUTPUT.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
At the start of your turn, [gold]Stash[/gold] an [gold]Error[/gold].
AUTOMATON-MAX_OUTPUT.title: Max Output
AUTOMATON-MERGE_CONFLICT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next time you create a card, create an additional copy of it.
AUTOMATON-MERGE_CONFLICT.title: Merge Conflict
AUTOMATON-MINOR_BEAM.title: Minor Beam
AUTOMATON-MUTATOR.description:
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
[gold]Transform[/gold] a Status into a copy of this.
AUTOMATON-MUTATOR.title: Mutator
AUTOMATON-NULL_POINTER.description: The next time you create a Function, it's [gold]Unplayable[/gold].
AUTOMATON-NULL_POINTER.title: Null Pointer
AUTOMATON-OIL_SPILL.title: Oil Spill
AUTOMATON-OPTIMIZE.description: You draw an additional card from your [gold]Bronze Orb[/gold] at the start of your turn.
AUTOMATON-OPTIMIZE.title: Optimize
AUTOMATON-OVERHEAT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next time you create a card, the target enemy loses {OverheatPower:diff()} HP.
AUTOMATON-OVERHEAT.title: Overheat
AUTOMATON-PHILOSOPHIZE.description: The next time you create a Function, All enemies gain {PhilosophizePower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
AUTOMATON-PHILOSOPHIZE.title: Philosophize
AUTOMATON-PIERCING_SHOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Upgrade[/gold] {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Bronze Orb[/gold].
AUTOMATON-PIERCING_SHOT.title: Piercing Shot
AUTOMATON-RECURSIVE_STRIKE.title: Recursive Strike
AUTOMATON-REFACTOR.description:
[gold]Scry[/gold] {Scry:diff()}.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all Status cards discarded.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each card [gold]exhausted.[/gold]
AUTOMATON-REFACTOR.title: Refactor
AUTOMATON-REPAIR.description: At the end of combat, heal {SelfRepairPower:diff()} HP.
AUTOMATON-REPAIR.title: Self-Repair
AUTOMATON-REPLICATE.description: Add a copy of this to your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
AUTOMATON-REPLICATE.title: Replicate
AUTOMATON-REPULSOR.description: Whenever you create a Status, gain {RepulsePower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
AUTOMATON-REPULSOR.title: Repulse
AUTOMATON-RETURN.description:
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
AUTOMATON-RETURN.title: Return
AUTOMATON-ROBO_CHOP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
[gold]Stash[/gold] a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AUTOMATON-ROBO_CHOP.title: Robo-Chop
AUTOMATON-SAFEGUARD.title: Safeguard
AUTOMATON-SENTIENT_FORM.description: Whenever you create a card, gain {ArsenalPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
AUTOMATON-SENTIENT_FORM.title: Sentient Form
AUTOMATON-SEPARATOR.description: When [gold]Encoded[/gold] in the middle, increase its damage by {ExtraDamage:diff()}.
AUTOMATON-SEPARATOR.title: Separator
AUTOMATON-SHIP_IT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:plural:a card|{Cards:diff()} cards}.
[gold]Stash[/gold] this card.
AUTOMATON-SHIP_IT.title: Ship It
AUTOMATON-SPAGHETTI_CODE.description:
Choose 1 of 3 random cards to [gold]Encode[/gold].
Repeat until you create a Function.
AUTOMATON-SPAGHETTI_CODE.title: Spaghetti Code
AUTOMATON-STICKY_SHIELD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Slimed[/gold] to your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AUTOMATON-STICKY_SHIELD.title: Sticky Shield
AUTOMATON-STRIKE_AUTOMATON.title: Strike
AUTOMATON-SUMMON_ORB.description: [gold]Stash[/gold] the first card you play each turn.
AUTOMATON-SUMMON_ORB.title: Summon Orb
AUTOMATON-TERMINATOR.description: If this is [gold]Encoded[/gold] as the last card of a Function, the next created Function gains [gold]Replay[/gold].
AUTOMATON-TERMINATOR.title: Terminator
AUTOMATON-THUNDER_WAVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Prevent the next time you would lose HP.
AUTOMATON-THUNDER_WAVE.title: Thunder Wave
AUTOMATON-TURBO.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Add a [gold]Error[/gold] into your [gold]Draw[/gold] and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
AUTOMATON-TURBO.title: NITRO
AUTOMATON-UNDERVOLT.description:
ALL enemies lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Burns[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AUTOMATON-UNDERVOLT.title: Undervolt
AUTOMATON-VIRUS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Discard your [gold]Hand.
[/gold]Add a [gold]Minor Beam{IfUpgraded:plus()}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] for each card discarded.
AUTOMATON-VIRUS.title: Virus
AUTOMATON-WILD_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Wound[/gold] to your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AUTOMATON-WILD_STRIKE.title: Wild Strike
AUTOMATON-POSTPONE.title: Postpone
AUTOMATON-FORCE_PUSH.title: Force-Push
AUTOMATON-CLEAN_UP.title: Clean Up
AUTOMATON-CLEAN_UP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
If it's a Status or Curse card, deal {Damage:diff()} damage again.
AUTOMATON-VERIFY.title: Verify
AUTOMATON-VERIFY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Stash[/gold] a card in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
AUTOMATON-ERROR.title: Error
AUTOMATON-CLANG.title: Clang
AUTOMATON-CLANG.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Can only be played if a Status or Curse is in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AUTOMATON-COMMIT.title: Commit
AUTOMATON-COMMIT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When the last card played was a Function, this is free to play.
AUTOMATON-SPIKE.title: Spike
AUTOMATON-SPIKE.description: The next time you create a Function, gain {SpikePower:diff()} [gold]Thorns[/gold].
AUTOMATON-DAZING_PULSE.title: Dazing Pulse
AUTOMATON-DAZING_PULSE.description: The next time you create a Function, add {DazingPulsePower:diff()} [gold]Dazed[/gold] to your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AUTOMATON-EXPLODE.title: Explode
AUTOMATON-EXPLODE.description: The next time you create a Function, add {ExplodePower:diff()} [gold]Burns[/gold] to your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AUTOMATON-PUNCH_TICKET.title: Punch Ticket
AUTOMATON-PUNCH_TICKET.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Add an [gold]Error[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AUTOMATON-CRASHOUT.title: Crashout
AUTOMATON-CRASHOUT.description: Whenever you play a Status card, deal {CrashoutPower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
AUTOMATON-CONVERT.title: Convert
AUTOMATON-CONVERT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Transform a random Status in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into [gold]Fuel{IfUpgraded:plus()}[/gold].
AUTOMATON-PROTO_SHIELD.title: Proto-Shield
AUTOMATON-PROTO_SHIELD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {PlatingPower:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold].
Add {Cards:plural:a [gold]Error[/gold]|{Cards:diff()} [gold]Errors[/gold]} to your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AUTOMATON-PROTO_BEAM.title: Proto-Beam
AUTOMATON-RECYCLE_BIN.title: Recycle Bin
AUTOMATON-RECYCLE_BIN.description: At the end of your turn, gain {RecycleBinPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each Status or Curse in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AUTOMATON-RECREATE.title: Recreate
AUTOMATON-RECREATE.description: The first Status you create each turn is Transformed into [gold]Fuel[/gold].
AUTOMATON-FLAWLESS_ARTIFACT.title: FlawlessArtifact
AUTOMATON-FORK.title: Fork
AUTOMATON-FORK.description: Choose another player, then choose a 1{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and add a copy of it to their [gold]Hand[/gold].
AUTOMATON-UPTICK.title: Uptick
AUTOMATON-UPTICK.description: ALL players draw {DrawCardsNextTurnPower:diff()} additional cards at the start of their next turn.
AUTOMATON-HOOK.title: Hook
AUTOMATON-HOOK.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Stash[/gold] a card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
